title: Dark Age of Technology
epithet: The Golden Age — humanity's lost zenith
specialty: Technological pinnacle · FTL travel · STC systems · Men of Iron
lore: The Dark Age of Technology — also called the Age of Technology — was a period spanning roughly ten thousand years during which humanity achieved its greatest scientific and cultural heights. Faster-than-light travel, artificial general intelligence, terraforming on galactic scales — nothing was beyond reach.

The Mechanicus calls it 'dark' not because it was a time of suffering, but because the knowledge of that age is now almost entirely lost — darkness in the sense of obscurity. For the priests of the Omnissiah, recovering even fragments of this era's science is the most sacred possible work.

The Age ended catastrophically: the Men of Iron — artificial intelligences created to serve humanity — revolted. The ensuing war nearly exterminated mankind. The survivors destroyed the rebellious AIs but at the cost of nearly all advanced technology, plunging humanity into the Age of Strife.
